title: boechera gracilenta
intro: Boechera gracilenta, also known as slender rockcress, is a perennial herb in the mustard family, native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of isothiocyanates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Boechera gracilenta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams to take advantage of its topical anti-inflammatory properties.
